info.title: Ontology Platform MVP6.12 Advanced Visualization Planning API
info.description: Planning-only OpenAPI artifact for MVP6.12 Advanced Visualization P0 (read-only, whole-graph graph-viz data + graph-level summary statistics over a project's PUBLISHED graph). Additive to MVP1-MVP6.11; replaces no prior OpenAPI draft. The surface is READ-ONLY and the thinnest additive delta over the two existing graph read surfaces (MVP3 published graph, MVP4 graph-explore): the genuine gap it fills is graph-level SUMMARY STATISTICS (computed in a single O(V+E) pass over the FULL published graph) plus a WHOLE-GRAPH (not root-anchored) bounded node/edge view with client-side layout HINTS. Neighborhood/focus stays served by the existing MVP4 graph-explore endpoint (root + hops) and is NOT re-implemented here. Bounded + deterministic + byte-stable modulo generated_at: caps 150 nodes / 300 edges + truncated + exact totals; over budget -> TOO_LARGE_SUMMARY_ONLY (summary over the full graph, elements omitted) reusing the MVP4 SAFE_TOO_LARGE precedent verbatim; no current published version -> 200 EMPTY. It computes NOTHING that mutates or re-homes data: no graph mutation (published/candidate/draft), no publish, no PublishedGraphVersion/PublishedGraphSnapshot creation, no server-side x/y layout, no layout persistence/cache. GraphVizScope=PUBLISHED single literal; CANDIDATE reserved, never produced in P0. Reuses MVP4 GraphExploreNode/GraphExploreEdge/GraphTooLargeState/PublishedGraphVersionRef and MVP1 class_id/relation_id and MVP5 Role by reference (no renames). Every response carries an all-false 6-flag GraphVizMutationGuard. See ADR 0019 and docs/pm/MVP6_12_ADVANCED_VIZ_BRIEF.md.

tags.name: MVP6.12 Advanced Visualization
tags.description: Read-only whole-graph viz data + graph-level summary statistics over the PUBLISHED graph. Bounded (150/300 + truncated + exact totals) with a too-large-summary-only fallback; layout HINTS only (degree/component_id/class group), no server-side coordinates; nothing mutated, published, versioned, snapshotted, cached, or persisted; all-false mutation guard on every response.

get.summary: Get read-only whole-graph viz data + summary for a project's published graph
get.description: Read-only, compute-on-read graph-visualization surface for a project's PUBLISHED graph. Returns graph-level summary statistics (node_counts_by_class, edge_counts_by_relation, density, component_count, largest_component_size, isolated_node_count, max_degree) computed in a single O(V+E) pass over the FULL published graph, plus a bounded WHOLE-GRAPH node/edge view (caps 150 nodes / 300 edges) with client-side layout HINTS (degree, component_id) and NO server-side x/y coordinates. Statuses: READY (both totals within budget -> full bounded nodes[]/edges[] + full summary, truncated=false, too_large=null); TOO_LARGE_SUMMARY_ONLY (either total over its cap -> nodes[]/edges[] EMPTY, summary still exact over the FULL graph, truncated=true, too_large populated) mirroring the MVP4 SAFE_TOO_LARGE precedent; EMPTY (published graph has zero entities -> zeroed summary, empty elements, too_large=null). No current published version and none requested -> 200 EMPTY (a result state, not a 4xx). Optional query: version_id (target a specific published version; unknown -> 404 PUBLISHED_GRAPH_VERSION_NOT_FOUND), node_cap [1,150], edge_cap [1,300] (out of range -> 400 INVALID_CAP), and read-only class_ids/relation_ids filter hints (bound the element set only; the summary is ALWAYS over the full published graph). Compute-on-read: no viz_id, no GET-by-id, no list. Any project member who can view the project (and its MVP3 Published Graph Explorer) may read; reuses MVP5 Role, no new role literal. Deterministic node/edge ordering, byte-stable modulo generated_at. Carries an all-false 6-flag GraphVizMutationGuard.

200.description: Graph-viz data + summary (READY / TOO_LARGE_SUMMARY_ONLY / EMPTY). Always carries an all-false GraphVizMutationGuard.

VersionIdQuery.name: version_id
VersionIdQuery.description: Optional published graph version id to target. Omitted -> the project's current published version (or 200 EMPTY if none). Unknown -> 404 PUBLISHED_GRAPH_VERSION_NOT_FOUND.

NodeCapQuery.name: node_cap
NodeCapQuery.description: Node budget for the bounded whole-graph view. Out of range -> 400 INVALID_CAP. The summary is always exact over the full graph regardless of cap.

EdgeCapQuery.name: edge_cap
EdgeCapQuery.description: Edge budget for the bounded whole-graph view. Out of range -> 400 INVALID_CAP. The summary is always exact over the full graph regardless of cap.

ClassIdsQuery.name: class_ids
ClassIdsQuery.description: Read-only filter hint (G1): restrict the bounded element set to these MVP1 class_ids. Bounds the nodes[]/edges[] view only; the summary is ALWAYS over the full published graph. Deferrable to P1 per open question G1.

RelationIdsQuery.name: relation_ids
RelationIdsQuery.description: Read-only filter hint (G1): restrict the bounded element set to these MVP1 relation_ids. Bounds the nodes[]/edges[] view only; the summary is ALWAYS over the full published graph. Deferrable to P1 per open question G1.

BadRequest.description: Invalid request (INVALID_CAP: node_cap outside [1,150] or edge_cap outside [1,300]).

Forbidden.description: Permission denied (PERMISSION_DENIED: caller is not a member who can view this project).

NotFound.description: Resource not found (PROJECT_NOT_FOUND / PUBLISHED_GRAPH_VERSION_NOT_FOUND). Note: a project with no current published version and no version_id requested returns 200 EMPTY, not 404.

GraphVizStatus.description: Viz-scoped result status (structural precedent = MVP4 GraphExploreState, not renamed). READY = full bounded viz data + summary within budget. TOO_LARGE_SUMMARY_ONLY = over budget; exact summary + totals only, no elements (mirrors MVP4 SAFE_TOO_LARGE). EMPTY = published graph has zero entities (also returned when no current published version exists and none was requested). No ERROR state in P0: an invalid target is a 400/403/404, not a result state.

GraphVizScope.description: Asserts which graph the viz reads. PUBLISHED is the only literal ever produced in P0: the viz reads the published graph only, never candidate, never draft. CANDIDATE is reserved (P1 candidate viz + candidate/published comparison) and is NEVER produced in P0.

GraphVizMutationGuard.description: All-false 6-flag mutation guard present on EVERY graph-viz response (READY / TOO_LARGE_SUMMARY_ONLY / EMPTY). Every flag is false, always; MVP6.12 turns NO flag true, ever. published_graph_mutated + layout_persisted are the headline assertions: the viz reads already-published facts and computes layout HINTS only (no server-side coordinates, nothing cached/stored). Mirrors the MVP6.1-6.11 all-false pattern.

PublishedGraphVersionRef.description: Reused-by-reference from MVP4 (openapi-mvp4-draft.json; no rename). The published graph version the viz was computed over. Present for READY and TOO_LARGE_SUMMARY_ONLY; may be null for EMPTY when no current published version exists.

GraphVizClassCount.description: One summary bucket keyed by an opaque MVP1 class_id (no new enum).

GraphVizRelationCount.description: One summary bucket keyed by an opaque MVP1 relation_id (no new enum).

GraphVizSummary.description: Graph-level summary statistics computed in a single linear O(V+E) pass (counts + union-find) over the FULL published graph. Exact in every status (READY, TOO_LARGE_SUMMARY_ONLY, EMPTY). No layout, no centrality, no clustering, no path-finding. density (G3) = directed E / (V*(V-1)) for V>1, else 0; component_count + largest_component_size are over the UNDIRECTED projection of edges (connectivity ignores direction).

node_counts_by_class.description: Exact per-class node counts (deterministically ordered). Sum == total_node_count.

edge_counts_by_relation.description: Exact per-relation edge counts (deterministically ordered). Sum == total_edge_count.

density.description: Directed graph density E / (V*(V-1)) for V>1, else 0 (G3).

component_count.description: Number of connected components over the undirected projection of edges (G3). 0 when the graph is empty.

largest_component_size.description: Node count of the largest connected component (undirected projection). 0 when empty.

GraphVizNode.description: A published-graph node projected for whole-graph visualization. Reuses the MVP4 GraphExploreNode element fields by reference (published_entity_id, class_id, label, properties, quality_summary, source_count, evidence_count, lineage_available; no rename) PLUS client-side layout HINTS (degree, component_id). There are NO x/y coordinates: layout is computed client-side. The MVP4 root-anchored 'hop' field is not meaningful for a whole-graph view and is omitted. Present only when status=READY.

degree.description: Layout HINT: undirected degree of this node in the full published graph.

component_id.description: Layout HINT: deterministic id of the connected component (undirected projection) this node belongs to. NOT a coordinate.

GraphVizEdge.description: A published-graph edge projected for whole-graph visualization. Reuses the MVP4 GraphExploreEdge element fields by reference (published_relation_id, source_node_id, target_node_id, relation_id, label, properties, quality_summary, evidence_count, lineage_available; no rename). No layout coordinates. Present only when status=READY.

GraphVizTooLargeState.description: Reused-by-reference from MVP4 GraphTooLargeState (SAFE_TOO_LARGE precedent; no rename). Present ONLY when status=TOO_LARGE_SUMMARY_ONLY. node_budget/edge_budget default to the 150/300 caps (or the caller's in-range caps). suggested_filters carries read-only narrowing hints (class/relation ids); message is user-facing copy.

estimated_nodes.description: Exact total node count of the full published graph (over budget).

estimated_edges.description: Exact total edge count of the full published graph (over budget).

GraphVizResponse.description: Read-only whole-graph viz data + summary for a project's published graph. scope is always PUBLISHED in P0. summary is exact in every status. nodes[]/edges[] are populated only when status=READY (empty for TOO_LARGE_SUMMARY_ONLY and EMPTY). too_large is populated only when status=TOO_LARGE_SUMMARY_ONLY. Deterministic + byte-stable modulo generated_at. Always carries an all-false GraphVizMutationGuard.

published_graph_version_ref.description: The published graph version projected over. Present for READY / TOO_LARGE_SUMMARY_ONLY; null (or omitted) for EMPTY when no current published version exists.

generated_at.description: The ONLY non-byte-stable field: two calls over the same published version yield byte-identical bodies modulo this timestamp.

node_cap.description: Effective node budget applied (default 150, or the caller's in-range node_cap).

edge_cap.description: Effective edge budget applied (default 300, or the caller's in-range edge_cap).

truncated.description: true iff status=TOO_LARGE_SUMMARY_ONLY (elements omitted). false for READY and EMPTY.

nodes.description: Bounded whole-graph nodes with layout hints. Deterministically ordered. Populated only when status=READY; empty otherwise.

edges.description: Bounded whole-graph edges. Deterministically ordered. Populated only when status=READY; empty otherwise.

too_large.description: Populated ONLY when status=TOO_LARGE_SUMMARY_ONLY; null/omitted otherwise.

boundary_note.description: Human-readable read-only assertion, e.g. 'read-only visualization - nothing changes the graph; publishing stays the separate MVP3 publish path.'

ApiError.description: Standard error envelope. P0 graph-viz codes: INVALID_CAP (400), PERMISSION_DENIED (403), PROJECT_NOT_FOUND (404), PUBLISHED_GRAPH_VERSION_NOT_FOUND (404). Note: a project with no current published version and no version_id requested is NOT an error - it yields a 200 response with status=EMPTY.

GraphVizReadyExample.summary: READY - whole-graph bounded view within budget

value.boundary_note: read-only visualization - nothing changes the graph; publishing stays the separate MVP3 publish path.

GraphVizTooLargeExample.summary: TOO_LARGE_SUMMARY_ONLY - over budget; summary exact, elements omitted

too_large.message: This published graph is too large to render fully (5200 nodes / 14800 edges over the 150 / 300 budget). Showing summary only - narrow with class/relation filters or focus a node's neighborhood.

value.boundary_note: read-only visualization - nothing changes the graph; publishing stays the separate MVP3 publish path.

GraphVizEmptyExample.summary: EMPTY - no current published version / zero entities

value.boundary_note: read-only visualization - nothing changes the graph; publishing stays the separate MVP3 publish path.
